meaning: vt.把...看作,尊敬,尊重,认为n.尊敬,尊重
examples: You need to build your self-esteem.
She is held in high esteem by her colleagues.
Good self-esteem is a prerequisite for a happy life.
Men feel they can be neither of these and they work hard to establish self esteem.
The pharmaceutical industry has fallen pretty far from the public esteem it once enjoyed.
